tasks.label: quality-gate: make test (captured)
args: set -o pipefail && make test > /tmp/quickscale-quality-gate-make-test.log 2>&1; status=$?; tail -n 120 /tmp/quickscale-quality-gate-make-test.log; exit $status

tasks.label: quality-gate: make test (captured bash)
args: set -o pipefail && make test > /tmp/quickscale-quality-gate-make-test.log 2>&1; status=$?; tail -n 120 /tmp/quickscale-quality-gate-make-test.log; exit $status

tasks.label: quality-gate: inspect running pytest (pgrep)
args: pgrep -af pytest || true; pgrep -af 'make test' || true

tasks.label: quality-gate: wait for make test completion
args: while pgrep -f '^make test$' >/dev/null; do sleep 10; done; tail -n 200 /tmp/quickscale-quality-gate-make-test.log

tasks.label: quality-gate: wait for make test completion (simple)
args: while pgrep -f "make test" >/dev/null; do sleep 10; done; tail -n 200 /tmp/quickscale-quality-gate-make-test.log

tasks.label: quality-gate: inspect running pytest (pgrep 2)
args: pgrep -af pytest || true; pgrep -af "make test" || true

tasks.label: quality-gate: make ci-e2e (captured bash)
args: set -o pipefail && make ci-e2e > /tmp/quickscale-quality-gate-make-ci-e2e.log 2>&1; status=$?; tail -n 200 /tmp/quickscale-quality-gate-make-ci-e2e.log; exit $status
